ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the district is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the district */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the district in square kilometers */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the school year (e.g., 1999/2000) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the school year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the school year */,
  "budget_allocation" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the school year */,
  "enrollment_target" INTEGER /* Target enrollment number for the school year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school year */,
  "enrollment_count" INTEGER /* Number of enrollments in the district for the school year */,
  "enrollment_rate" REAL /* Enrollment rate for the district and school year */,
  "drop_out_rate" REAL /* Drop-out rate for the district and school year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES school_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the student is enrolled */,
  "enrollment_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school year when the student enrolled */,
  "student_status" TEXT /* Status of the student (e.g., active, inactive, graduated) */,
  "guardian_name" TEXT /* Name of the student's guardian */,
  "guardian_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the student's guardian */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Any disability status of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_enrollment_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_year_id") REFERENCES school_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the student */,
  "socioeconomic_status" TEXT /* Socioeconomic status of the student */,
  "parental_education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the student's parents */,
  "first_language" TEXT /* First language of the student */,
  "immigration_status" TEXT /* Immigration status of the student */,
  "language_spoken_at_home" TEXT /* Language spoken at home by the student */,
  "household_income" REAL /* Household income of the student's family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the school is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., public, private, charter) */,
  "school_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the school */,
  "school_rating" REAL /* Rating of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school where the class is located */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the teacher assigned to the class */,
  "class_level" TEXT /* Level of the class (e.g., Grade 1, Grade 2) */,
  "class_size" INTEGER /* Number of students in the class */,
  "class_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the class in minutes */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the teacher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the teacher */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the teacher */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the teacher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the teacher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school where the teacher is employed */,
  "teacher_qualification" TEXT /* Qualification of the teacher (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's) */,
  "teacher_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the teacher */,
  "teacher_specialization" TEXT /* Subject or area of specialization of the teacher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teachers_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student was enrolled in the class */,
  "attendance_rate" REAL /* Attendance rate of the student in the class */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade of the student in the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_enrollments_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Teacher, Parent) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
